{{CargoRelic
|name=Gutenberg's Press
|class_id=21509
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=02-16
|source=
|description=On Feb 16, 1455 AD, Gutenberg invented the modern printing technique and press.<br>Gutenberg's invention of the printing press in the 15th century marked a significant breakthrough in printing technology. His method involved casting individual, reusable type pieces using a matrix and hand mold, which allowed for the efficient production of large numbers of movable types by pouring a lead alloy into molds. This innovation enabled the successful printing of about 180 copies of the Gutenberg Bible, setting the foundation for modern mass printing techniques.
|fame=69
|art=60
|fth=58
|civ=107
|tech=68
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +9<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +18<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +27<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +9
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +45<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +15
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +63<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +21
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: This Relic's CIV +15
|skill2=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: In Kemet, Travel SPD +9%
|skill3=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: B-tad output +3000
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Gutenberg Printing|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Superstar Ad Flyer, +3|orange}}
|3name=Movable Type No.1|3rec=1.70M|3atk=29935|3defense=19886|3hp=325227|3weak=6943
|4name=Movable Type No.8|4rec=3.48M|4atk=45760|4defense=30399|4hp=702415|4weak=10023
|5name=Movable Type No.9|5rec=6.66M|5atk=65723|5defense=43660|5hp=1311848|5weak=12399
|6name=Movable Type No.19|6rec=11.98M|6atk=90207|6defense=59924|6hp=2292384|6weak=14889
|Arec=25.19M|Aatk=119422|Adefense=79332|Ahp=3802300|Aweak=18112
}}}}
